title: nu: Mail Padded Bubble Envelope Medium | 3 Pack | Protective Packaging | Eco-Friendly | Superior Cushioning for Shipping & Moving
features: NU MAIL: White bubble lined padded mailers are the most reliable packaging solution for trasporting a variety of fragile items and protecting your goods. These medium sized bubble mailer envelopes measure Usable size: 23 x 34cm, Outside size: 25 x 35cm, with 3 envelopes in the pack.

PEEL & SEAL: Each padded mailer envelope has a strong self-sealing adhesive strip at the closure end. Simply peel and fold over to seal each package safely and securely. Eliminating the need for shipping boxes and using tape.

DURABLE: With an opaque outer, these envelopes protect your goods securely and privately. Also giving the user opportunity to write on the envelope, stick labels or stamp without damaging the inner product.

SUSTAINABLE: These envelopes are krafted with FSC mix paper on the external and the internal bubble lining inside is made using 30% recycled plastic, helping reduce plastic waste but also minimising the demand for new plastic production.
description: RECYCLABLE: Manufactured in LDPE material, this means the components made to kraft these rolls can be recycled at front of supermarket stores aside any plastic carrier bags you may have finished use of.
